title: Harden tickflow dashboard debugging and exit paths
description: Add non-interactive dump mode, debug logging, background state loading, and optional watchdog timeout for /tickflow-dashboard so dashboard hangs can be diagnosed without restarting Pi.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard extension loads; /tickflow-dashboard --dump works in print mode; go test ./... passes
closed_reason: Implemented dashboard dump/debug/watchdog and background loading; verified extension loads and go test ./... passes
